name: Southampton Golf Range
about: Southampton Golf Range is a premier public golf facility featuring a driving range with 14 covered, TopTracer-equipped bays, automatic tees from Power Tee, and additional practice amenities like chipping areas and putting greens. The venue also includes an 18-hole mini golf course, batting cages, and a Local Burger Co. food establishment on-site. For golf simulation, it offers a private room with a Trugolf simulator and E6 Connect software, providing access to over 90 world-renowned courses and detailed swing analysis using a 3 high-speed camera system.
why_golfers_like_it: Trugolf simulator with E6 Connect software for realistic play and swing analysis
Over 90 world-renowned courses available for play in a private, comfortable room
TopTracer technology on the driving range for engaging practice sessions

simulator_hardware.notes: Private room with 3 high-speed camera system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to call ahead to inquire about club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue features a Local Burger Co. on-site, but it is unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted. It's best to check with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes in the simulator is not specified on the website, but it typically depends on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Southampton Golf Range is kid-friendly. It offers an 18-hole mini golf course, a golf camp for juniors, and batting cages suitable for all ages.
